task: Implement Tool Loop Phase 2 (parallel execution) for EvoClaw (clawinfra/evoclaw repo). Phase 1 single-tool-per-turn is done in internal/orchestrator/toolloop.go. Phase 2 adds: (1) parse multiple tool_call entries from a single LLM response, (2) execute independent tool calls concurrently via goroutines with errgroup, (3) fan-out to edge agents in parallel and collect results, (4) merge all results back into next LLM context turn. Also add parallel execution metrics (parallelism_degree, concurrent_calls, wall_time_saved). Must be backward compatible with Ph.1 single-tool flow. Add tests (Go table-driven) achieving >=85% coverage on the modified packages. Branch feat/tool-loop-ph2, PR linking roadmap. gh CLI as AlexChen31337.
